intent: Reconcile the dated asset ZIP snapshot against source and filesystem image records by CRC+size before any archive move is approved.
source_rule: The ZIP is frozen evidence. CRC+size coverage helps prove custody, but it does not authorize source moves, archive creation, receipt writes, runtime sync, or deploy.
required_next_gate: If any ZIP/source mismatch appears, resolve it before exact archive approval.
Treat CRC+size as archive snapshot evidence; source SHA-256 remains the stronger live filesystem proof.
Rerun this reconciliation after refreshing the ZIP or source tree.
